title: Device Home Screen - Battery Charging Icon
scenario: Battery charging icon shows bolt instead of percentage when headset is connected to charger on Device Home Screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. From the Home screen, ensure a Poly headset or earbuds is paired and connected.
3. Observe the battery icon displayed on the Home screen for the connected device.
4. Connect the headset/earbuds to a charger (e.g., via USB cable).
5. Observe the battery icon on the Home screen again.
6. Disconnect the charger from the headset/earbuds.
7. Observe the battery icon on the Home screen once more.
expected: Step 3: The battery icon shows the current battery percentage value. Step 5: The battery icon changes to show a bolt (lightning) icon instead of the percentage value. Step 7: The bolt icon disappears and the battery percentage value is displayed again.
